item.description:
Definitive additional proxy materials for pending merger vote

Filed DEFA14A providing additional proxy solicitation materials in connection with its pending acquisition. Shareholders are being asked to vote on the merger; the filing supplements the definitive proxy statement.

About: Phreesia, Inc. provides an integrated SaaS-based software and payment platform for the healthcare industry in the United States and Canada. Its Phreesia Platform offers a suite of solutions to manage the patient intake process, as well as an integrated payments solution for processing of patient payments.

item.title: 🤝 Merger · GXXFF
item.ns0:headline: Acquires remaining Gold Basin shares for 0.592 CANEX shares; meeting June 4
item.description:
Acquires remaining Gold Basin shares for 0.592 CANEX shares; meeting June 4

CANEX Metals, which already owns 51.86% of Gold Basin Resources, will acquire the remaining shares via a plan of arrangement. Gold Basin shareholders will receive 0.592 CANEX shares per share, representing a 242% premium to the last trading price before the cease trade order. The deal is expected to close in June 2026, subject to shareholder approval at a meeting on June 4, 2026, court and regulatory approvals, and other customary conditions.

About: Gold Basin Resources Corporation engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral property assets in North America. It holds interest in the Gold Basin project, which comprises five mineral rights covering 2,389 acres and 290 unpatented mining claims covering 5,280 acres located in Mohave County, Arizona. The company was formerly known as Fiorentina Minerals Inc. Gold Basin Resources Corporation was incorporated in 2017 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.

  • Premium: 242.0
  • Consideration: stock
  • Announced: 2026-05-11
  • Expected Close: June 2026

item.title: 🤝 Merger · TWO
item.ns0:headline: Adds pro-rated dividend to merger consideration; total cash value $12.45-$12.68/share; vote May 19
item.description:
Adds pro-rated dividend to merger consideration; total cash value $12.45-$12.68/share; vote May 19

CrossCountry Mortgage announces that Two Harbors stockholders will receive a pro-rated dividend for the quarter in which the acquisition closes, providing total cash value of approximately $12.45 to $12.68 per share. The special meeting to vote on the merger is scheduled for May 19, 2026; CrossCountry has obtained 39 of 53 required regulatory approvals. The filing also criticizes a competing non-binding proposal from UWM Holdings.

About: Two Harbors Investment Corp. operates as a real estate investment trust (REIT) that focuses on investing in, financing, and managing residential mortgage-backed securities (RMBS), non-agency securities, mortgage servicing rights, and other financial assets in the United States. Its target assets include agency RMBS collateralized by fixed rate mortgage loans, adjustable rate mortgage loans, and hybrid adjustable-rate mortgage (ARMs); and other assets, such as financial and mortgage-related asset…

  • Counterparty: CrossCountry Mortgage
  • Offer price: $12.45-$12.68
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-03-27
  • Expected Close: Q3 2026

item.title: 🤝 Merger · PRTX
item.ns0:headline: De-SPAC merger with SilverBox Corp IV; implied value $10.61-$130.06/share
item.description:
De-SPAC merger with SilverBox Corp IV; implied value $10.61-$130.06/share

Is merging with SilverBox Corp IV (SPAC) in a de-SPAC transaction. SilverBox shareholders will receive shares of Pubco Class A common stock, with implied value per share ranging from $10.61 to $130.06 depending on redemptions, plus earnout shares tied to $12.50/$15.00 stock price targets and adjustment shares tied to Bitcoin price. The extraordinary general meeting to vote on the business combination is pending; the deal includes a minimum cash condition of $25M.

  • Counterparty: SilverBox Corp IV
  • Consideration: stock
  • Announced: 2025-08-06

item.ns0:headline: Non-binding 595p/share cash bid for Tate & Lyle; PUSU June 11
item.description:
Non-binding 595p/share cash bid for Tate & Lyle; PUSU June 11

Made a non-binding all-cash offer for Tate & Lyle at 595 pence per share. Discussions and due diligence are ongoing; Ingredion has until June 11, 2026 to announce a firm intention or withdraw under UK Takeover Code Rule 2.6(a). Permitted dividends of up to 20p per share are allowed.

About: Ingredion Incorporated, together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells starches and sweeteners for various industries. It operates through four segments: North America; South America; Asia-Pacific; and Europe, Middle East and Africa. The company offers sweetener products comprising glucose syrups, high maltose syrups, high fructose corn syrups, caramel colors, dextrose, polyols, maltodextrins, and glucose syrup solids, as well as food-grade and industrial starches, biomaterials, and nutritio…

  • Offer price: 595 pence per share
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-05-14

item.title: 💧 Capital Return · Special Dividend · RLI
item.ns0:headline: Declares $2.00 special dividend + $250M buyback; record May 29
item.description:
Declares $2.00 special dividend + $250M buyback; record May 29

Announced a special cash dividend of $2.00 per share (approx. $184M total) and a regular quarterly dividend increase to $0.18 per share, plus a new $250M share repurchase program. Both dividends are payable June 12, 2026 to shareholders of record as of May 29, 2026. The buyback program has no expiration date and may be executed through open market or private transactions.

About: RLI Corp., an insurance holding company, underwrites property and casualty insurance in the United States and internationally. Its Casualty segment provides commercial and personal coverage products; and general liability products, such as coverage for third-party liability of commercial insureds, including manufacturers, contractors, apartments, and mercantile.

  • Consideration: cash

item.title: ⚔️ Proxy Contest · SEER
item.ns0:headline: Offers $2.40/share (42% premium) + CVR; nominates 3 directors
item.description:
Offers $2.40/share (42% premium) + CVR; nominates 3 directors

The Radoff-JEC Group, owning ~7.8% of Seer, submitted a third non-binding proposal to acquire the company for $2.40 per share in cash plus a contingent value right (CVR) entitling stockholders to 80% of net proceeds from any sale of Seer's assets. The offer represents a 42% premium to the unaffected share price and expires May 29, 2026. Simultaneously, the group is nominating three independent director candidates (Howard H. Berman, Joshua S. Horowitz, Luis E. Rinaldini) for election at the upcoming annual meeting, and intends to file a proxy statement to solicit votes.

About: Seer, Inc., a life sciences company, engages in developing and commercializing products to decode the secrets of the proteome. It develops Proteograph Product Suite, an integrated solution that comprises consumables, an automation instrumentation, and software that allows researchers to conduct proteomic studies in therapeutic and diagnostic research, and clinical trials.

  • Counterparty: Radoff-JEC Group
  • Offer price: $2.40
  • Premium: 42%
  • Stake: 7.8%
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-05-14

item.title: 📉 Delisting · Forced · APLS
item.ns0:headline: Forced delisting from Nasdaq
item.description:
Forced delisting from Nasdaq

Nasdaq Stock Market LLC filed a Form 25-NSE to remove Apellis Pharmaceuticals' common stock from listing and registration under Section 12(b) of the Exchange Act, citing Rule 12d2-2(a)(3). The delisting becomes effective 10 days after the filing date, on or about May 24, 2026. The stock is expected to trade on OTC markets thereafter.

About: Apellis Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company, focuses on the discovery, development, and commercialization of therapeutic compounds through the inhibition of the complement system for autoimmune and inflammatory diseases. The company's lead product candidate is pegcetacoplan that is in Phase III clinical trials for the treatment of geographic atrophy (GA) in age-related macular degeneration and paroxysmal nocturnal hemoglobinuria (PNH) diseases.

  • Expected Close: 2026-05-24

item.ns0:headline: Acquired by Sumitomo Forestry for $47/share cash; merger closed May 14
item.description:
Acquired by Sumitomo Forestry for $47/share cash; merger closed May 14

Completed its merger with a subsidiary of Sumitomo Forestry Co., Ltd. on May 14, 2026. Each share of common stock was converted into the right to receive $47.00 in cash. The company became an indirect wholly owned subsidiary of Sumitomo Forestry and will be delisted from the NYSE.

About: Tri Pointe Homes, Inc. engages in the design, construction, and sale of single-family attached and detached homes in the United States. The company operates through a portfolio of six brands comprising Maracay in Arizona; Pardee Homes in California and Nevada; Quadrant Homes in Washington; Trendmaker Homes in Texas; TRI Pointe Homes in California, Colorado, and the Carolinas; and Winchester Homes in Maryland, Virginia, and the District of Columbia.

  • Counterparty: Sumitomo Forestry
  • Offer price: 47.00

  • Expected Close: 2026-05-14

On May 13, 2026, CrossCountry Intermediate Holdco (CCM) waived restrictions to allow Two Harbors to pay a pro-rated stub period dividend up to $0.34 per share if the merger closes after a quarter end. item.ns0:headline: Acquires Vizsla Royalties for C$4.13/share (stock or cash election); ~C$327M total
item.description:
Acquires Vizsla Royalties for C$4.13/share (stock or cash election); ~C$327M total

Will acquire Vizsla Royalties via court-approved plan of arrangement. Each Vizsla share can elect 0.15 Elemental shares or C$4.13 cash or a mix, subject to proration with max cash ~C$82M. Total consideration ~C$327M (US$239M), a 31% premium to unaffected close. The deal adds exposure to the Panuco silver-gold project royalties.

About: A gold-focused royalty company that acquires and manages royalty interests in precious and base-metal mining operations globally.

item.title: 🤝 Merger · APLS
item.ns0:headline: Acquired by Biogen for $41/share + up to $4 CVR; merger closed
item.description:
Acquired by Biogen for $41/share + up to $4 CVR; merger closed

Biogen completed its acquisition of Apellis via a tender offer and subsequent merger under Section 251(h) of the DGCL. Shareholders received $41.00 per share in cash plus one contingent value right (CVR) with potential milestone payments of up to $4.00 per share. The tender offer expired with 82.4% of shares tendered, and the merger became effective on May 14, 2026.

About: Apellis Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company, focuses on the discovery, development, and commercialization of therapeutic compounds through the inhibition of the complement system for autoimmune and inflammatory diseases. The company's lead product candidate is pegcetacoplan that is in Phase III clinical trials for the treatment of geographic atrophy (GA) in age-related macular degeneration and paroxysmal nocturnal hemoglobinuria (PNH) diseases.

  • Counterparty: Biogen Inc.
  • Offer price: $41.00 cash + CVR (up to $4.00)
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-03-31
  • Expected Close: 2026-05-14

item.ns0:headline: Completes Apellis acquisition for $41/share + CVRs
item.description:
Completes Apellis acquisition for $41/share + CVRs

Completed its tender offer and merger with Apellis Pharmaceuticals, acquiring all outstanding shares for $41.00 per share in cash plus one contingent value right (CVR) per share. The CVRs entitle holders to up to $4.00 per CVR upon achievement of sales milestones for SYFOVRE®. The tender offer expired on May 13, 2026, with approximately 82.4% of shares tendered; payment was made on May 14, 2026.

About: Biogen Inc. discovers, develops, manufactures, and delivers therapies for treating neurological and neurodegenerative diseases. The company offers TECFIDERA, VUMERITY, AVONEX, PLEGRIDY, TYSABRI, and FAMPYRA for multiple sclerosis (MS); SPINRAZA for spinal muscular atrophy; and FUMADERM to treat plaque psoriasis.

  • Announced: 2026-03-31

Acquires Apex Marine for $5.97M in cash, stock, notes; closed May 13

Completed the acquisition of Apex Marine Companies for an aggregate purchase price of $5,966,667, consisting of $1.2 million cash, 679,012 shares of common stock valued at $2.70 per share ($1.8 million), and two promissory notes totaling $2,966,667. About: Off The Hook YS Inc. operates as a yacht and boat dealership which engages in the buying, selling, and wholesaling of yachts and boats. The company offers new and pre-owned boats as well as maintenance, repair, and support services. It also offers services, such as boat repossession and asset recovery, warranty and after-sale services, marketing, and finances to recreational boat buyers. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Wilmington, North Carolina.

item.title: 🤝 Merger · WF
item.ns0:headline: Share exchange for Tongyang clears dissent hurdle; 0.6% dissented, Rule 802 exemption
item.description:
Share exchange for Tongyang clears dissent hurdle; 0.6% dissented, Rule 802 exemption

Is proceeding with a share exchange to acquire Tongyang. The dissent period ended with only 4,396,004 shares (0.6%) dissenting, well below the 20% threshold that could have blocked the small-scale exchange. WFG now expects to rely on Rule 802 exemption and file Form CB instead of Form F-4.

About: Woori Financial Group Inc., together with its subsidiaries, operates as a commercial bank that provides a range of financial services to individual, business, and institutional customers in Korea. It operates through Banking, Credit Card, Capital, Investment Banking, and Others segments. The company offers savings, demand, and installment deposits; time deposits and certificates of deposit; and working capital, facilities, general purpose household, mortgage, and home equity loans.

  • Counterparty: Tongyang
  • Consideration: stock
  • Announced: 2026-04-24

item.description:

Entered into a Third Amendment to its merger agreement with BOXABL Inc., revising lock-up terms for company and sponsor shares. Under the amended lock-up, 50% of company shares are released 6 months post-close if the stock price meets or exceeds $12.00 for 20 of 30 trading days, with the remainder released at 13 months; sponsor shares have a 12-month release with similar $12 threshold. Full early release occurs if the price reaches $20.00 intraday. The merger remains subject to shareholder vote and regulatory approvals.

Rumble Inc. offers 2.0281 newly issued RUM Class A common shares for each Northern Data share in a stock-for-stock exchange. The additional acceptance period runs from May 15 to June 1, 2026; shareholders representing 72% have already committed to tender. The offer is not subject to a minimum tender threshold and is expected to close in Q2 2026.

About: Northern Data AG develops, builds, and operates high-performance computing (HPC) infrastructure solutions in Germany and internationally. It offers infrastructure for various HPC applications in the areas of cloud computing, cryptocurrency hosting services and hardware, and stationary and mobile data centers. The company was formerly known as Northern Bitcoin AG and changed its name to Northern Data AG in January 2020. Northern Data AG is headquartered in Frankfurt am Main, Germany.

  • Counterparty: Rumble Inc.
  • Offer price: 2.0281 RUM shares per NDTA share

item.ns0:headline: Spin-off of FedEx Freight declared; 1 share per 2 FDX shares, record May 15
item.description:
Spin-off of FedEx Freight declared; 1 share per 2 FDX shares, record May 15

Will spin off 80.1% of FedEx Freight to shareholders via a pro rata dividend. Shareholders receive 1 share of FedEx Freight (FDXF) for every 2 FDX shares held as of May 15, 2026. FedEx Freight will pay a $4.1B cash dividend to FedEx pre-separation; FedEx retains 19.9% stake to be disposed within 24 months. Trading on NYSE under FDXF begins June 1, 2026.

About: FedEx Corporation provides transportation, e-commerce, and business services in the United States and internationally. The company's FedEx Express segment offers express transportation, small-package ground delivery, and freight transportation services; time-critical transportation services; and cross-border enablement, technology, and e-commerce transportation solutions. Its FedEx Ground segment provides day-certain delivery services to businesses and residences.

item.ns0:headline: Received Nasdaq deficiency notice for missing annual meeting; must submit compliance plan by June 22
item.description:
Received Nasdaq deficiency notice for missing annual meeting; must submit compliance plan by June 22

On May 7, 2026, CEA Industries received a Nasdaq Staff letter notifying it of non-compliance with Listing Rule 5620(a) for failing to hold an annual meeting within 12 months of fiscal year end. The company has 45 days (until June 22, 2026) to submit a plan to regain compliance. If accepted, Nasdaq may grant an exception until October 27, 2026. The company intends to submit a plan and expects to hold an annual meeting soon.

About: CEA Industries Inc. is a U.S.-based company providing engineering, design, and technology solutions for the controlled environment agriculture (CEA) industry. Through its subsidiary Surna Cultivation Technologies LLC, it supplies proprietary environmental controls, HVAC, mechanical, electrical, and lighting systems primarily for indoor cannabis and specialty crop cultivation operations in North America.

item.description:

Critical Infrastructure Technologies (CiTech) announces acquisition of 100% of a Western Australian precision engineering and manufacturing company for AUD $5,775,000 on completion plus two deferred payments of AUD $962,500 each at first and second anniversaries. item.title: ⚖️ Litigation · MBRX
item.ns0:headline: Phase 2B/3 MIRACLE trial unblinding expected before June 30; blinded CR rate ~30% vs 17-18% historical
item.description:
Phase 2B/3 MIRACLE trial unblinding expected before June 30; blinded CR rate ~30% vs 17-18% historical

Announced imminent unblinding of first 45 subjects from its pivotal Phase 2B/3 MIRACLE trial evaluating Annamycin + cytarabine in relapsed/refractory AML. Preliminary blinded data show a complete remission rate of approximately 30%, compared to historical 17-18% for cytarabine alone. Unblinding is expected before June 30, 2026, with Part A recruitment on track to reach 90 subjects in Q3 2026.

item.ns0:headline: Nominates 3-director slate; 2026 annual meeting vote pending
item.description:
Nominates 3-director slate; 2026 annual meeting vote pending

BIMIZCI Fund, LLC, Warnke Investments LLC, ZimCal Asset Management, LLC, and Stephen Hodges have nominated Eric Kelly, John Kiernan, and Timothy Shanahan for election to Medallion Financial's board at the 2026 annual meeting. The group has launched a website (www.restoretheshine.com) and is soliciting shareholder votes. A definitive proxy statement was filed on May 8, 2026.

About: Medallion Financial Corp., together with its subsidiaries, operates as a finance company in the United States. The company operates through four segments: Recreation Lending, Home Improvement Lending, Commercial Lending, and Medallion Lending. It provides loans that finance consumer purchases of recreational vehicles, boats, and trailers; consumer home improvements; commercial businesses; and taxi medallions to individuals, and small to mid-size businesses.

FG Merger Corp. operates as a subsidiary of FG Merger Investors LLC.

item.description:
Enters fifth forbearance with J.J. Astor; $1.5M new convertible note, 1M shares issued

Entered a Fifth Forbearance Agreement with lender J.J. Astor & Co., modifying repayment terms on the outstanding Second Note ($5,995,722). The agreement includes a new $1,500,000 convertible note (the Fifth Note) with proceeds of $1,050,000, and issuance of 1,000,000 commitment shares. Repayment schedule extended to January 1, 2027, with weekly installments starting at $50,000 and increasing to $250,000. The company remains in default but avoids acceleration.

About: Vivakor, Inc. operates, acquires, and develops clean energy technologies and environmental solutions primarily focused on soil remediation in the United States and Kuwait. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Lehi, Utah.

It primarily invests in dividend paying stocks of companies.

item.description:
Spins off Harsco Environmental & Rail; SEC effective May 8; 1:3 distribution June 1

Corporation (New Enviri) will be spun off from Enviri Corporation via a pro-rata distribution of one share of New Enviri common stock for every three shares of CE Holdings common stock. The spin-off separates the Harsco Environmental and Harsco Rail segments into a new publicly traded company, while Clean Earth is being sold to Veolia. The SEC declared the Form 10 registration statement effective on May 8, 2026, and the distribution is expected to become effective on June 1, 2026.
